history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with short, dark, layered hair and a stylish fade haircut, wearing a black mesh jersey with white lettering and the number "88" prominently displayed. Underneath the jersey, they wear a long-sleeved white shirt. They also have on black pants and bright orange sneakers. A black and white trucker hat with graphics, including cartoon characters and red heart designs, adorns their head. A silver chain necklace and rings on their fingers add to the urban, streetwear aesthetic. The background features a textured, grey wall with a subtle pattern and two vertical metal door handles. The lighting is dim and dramatic, creating shadows and highlighting the subject. The overall mood is cool, confident, and fashionable, with a color palette dominated by black, white, grey, and pops of orange and red. The image has a slightly grainy, photographic quality, suggesting it was taken at night or in low light conditions.
